title: Los Mármoles Natural Reserve
description: A protected area of rugged terrain, pine forests, and diverse wildlife. Ideal for hiking, birdwatching, and photography, this reserve showcases the ecological richness of northern Estado de México.

title: Ruta de Hidalgo “Cabezas de Águila”
description: A historical trail commemorating the path of independence hero Miguel Hidalgo. Marked by symbolic monuments and scenic viewpoints, it offers a blend of history, nature, and reflection

title: Textile and Silver Workshops
description: Visit local artisan studios where wool is spun into traditional quexquémetls and silver is forged into elegant jewelry. These spaces offer hands-on experiences and a chance to support indigenous craftsmanship.
